description: The world ended not with a bang but with screams. Now, moldering cities stand empty except for shambling hordes of the undead, their bodies rotting as they hunt the living through broken streets and crumbling ruins. Survivors band together in hidden bunkers and fortified compounds, racing against time to find a cure before they too succumb to the virus. In this dead world, every day is a battle for existence.
endings: The rescue helicopter finally appeared, bringing salvation.
The vaccine worked, and the survivors became the new world.
They found the island where the undead could never follow.
They survived and rebuilt civilization from the ashes.
The infection was stopped, and the living reclaimed the earth.
They were reunited with their family in the safe zone.
The horde passed by, unaware of their hidden sanctuary.
Justice was served to those who betrayed the group.
They found the outbreak's source and destroyed it completely.
The radio signal got a response—rescue was coming at last.
The cure was completed, saving humanity from extinction.
The winter freeze gave them the chance to escape.
They watched as new life began to grow among the ruins.
The gates held strong, and the base became a beacon of hope.
They walked together into the sunrise, free at last.
The underground city was discovered, safe from all undead.
The animals returned, proving nature would heal.
They became legends, the survivors who saved humanity.
The memorial was built for those lost to the plague.
And the world belonged to the living once more.
